% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

% SZS output start Proof for superhero_positive

5. fights(sir_digby,nemesis_of_digby,surprising_adventures) [input(axiom)]

7. named_after(surprising_adventures,sir_digby) [input(axiom)]
8. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((fights(X0,X1,X2) & wins(X0,X2)) => ~wins(X1,X2)) [input(axiom)]

13. wins(nemesis_of_digby,surprising_adventures) [flattening 12]
15. ! [X0,X1] : (wins(X1,X0) | (~good_guy(X1,X0) | ~superhero_movie(X0))) [ennf transformation 1]
16. ! [X0,X1] : (wins(X1,X0) | ~good_guy(X1,X0) | ~superhero_movie(X0)) [flattening 15]
21. ! [X0,X1] : (good_guy(X1,X0) | (~named_after(X0,X1) | ~superhero_movie(X0))) [ennf transformation 6]
22. ! [X0,X1] : (good_guy(X1,X0) | ~named_after(X0,X1) | ~superhero_movie(X0)) [flattening 21]
23. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (~wins(X1,X2) | (~fights(X0,X1,X2) | ~wins(X0,X2))) [ennf transformation 8]
24. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (~wins(X1,X2) | ~fights(X0,X1,X2) | ~wins(X0,X2)) [flattening 23]
25. ~good_guy(X1,X0) | wins(X1,X0) | ~superhero_movie(X0) [cnf transformation 16]
26. superhero_movie(surprising_adventures) [cnf transformation 2]
29. fights(sir_digby,nemesis_of_digby,surprising_adventures) [cnf transformation 5]
30. ~named_after(X0,X1) | good_guy(X1,X0) | ~superhero_movie(X0) [cnf transformation 22]
31. named_after(surprising_adventures,sir_digby) [cnf transformation 7]
32. ~fights(X0,X1,X2) | ~wins(X1,X2) | ~wins(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 24]
34. wins(nemesis_of_digby,surprising_adventures) [cnf transformation 13]
35. good_guy(sir_digby,surprising_adventures) | ~superhero_movie(surprising_adventures) [resolution 30,31]
36. good_guy(sir_digby,surprising_adventures) [forward subsumption resolution 35,26]
37. wins(sir_digby,surprising_adventures) | ~superhero_movie(surprising_adventures) [resolution 36,25]
38. wins(sir_digby,surprising_adventures) [forward subsumption resolution 37,26]
39. ~wins(nemesis_of_digby,surprising_adventures) | ~wins(sir_digby,surprising_adventures) [resolution 32,29]
42. ~wins(sir_digby,surprising_adventures) [forward subsumption resolution 39,34]
43. $false [forward subsumption resolution 42,38]
% SZS output end Proof for superhero_positive
% Termination reason: Refutation

    sir_digby != nemesis_of_digby).

    superhero_movie(surprising_adventures)).

    good_guy(sir_digby,surprising_adventures)).

cnf(u28,axiom,

cnf(u38,axiom,

cnf(u31,axiom,
